meta.description: Master gazetteer for the Undercity - all districts, underground locations, and establishments

ring_structure.name: Tower Core
ring_structure.description: The Tower of Last Chance itself. Restricted access.

ring_structure.name: Grand Forum Ring
ring_structure.description: Administrative heart. Archives, courts, guild HQs.

ring_structure.name: Sanctum Ring
ring_structure.description: Religious and scholarly. Temples, academies, research.

ring_structure.name: Residential Ring
ring_structure.description: Where most citizens live. Middle to lower class.

ring_structure.name: Outer Ring
ring_structure.description: Industrial, military, Warrens pockets. The edge.

Tower of Last Chance.description: The ancient semi-sentient structure at the heart of the Undercity. The Oracle dwells within.

sub_areas.name: The Oracle Chamber
sub_areas.description: Where the Oracle speaks to those deemed worthy

sub_areas.name: The Great Beam
sub_areas.description: Energy column rising from the Tower apex, visible everywhere

sub_areas.name: Archival Vaults
sub_areas.description: Deep storage of records the Tower Authority deems sensitive

Grand Forum.description: The open plaza at the city's political heart. Public announcements, political maneuvering, information brokers.

sub_areas.name: Petitioner's Steps
sub_areas.description: Where citizens wait for audience with officials

notable_establishments.name: The Gilded Quill
notable_establishments.description: Upscale establishment favored by diplomats and info brokers

notable_establishments.name: Grand Forum Library
notable_establishments.description: Guild of Ashen Scrolls main archive

Guild Spires.description: Towering faction headquarters. The Adventurers Guild, Merchant Guild, and Artificers make their homes here.

sub_areas.name: Adventurers Guild Hall
sub_areas.description: Mission board, registration, Mari Fen's desk

sub_areas.name: Silver Spire
sub_areas.description: Aric Veyne's tower, SS-Rank adventurer residence

Archive Row.description: Glass Sigil territory. Libraries, scriptoriums, and the accumulated knowledge of ages.

sub_areas.name: Grand Archive Dome
sub_areas.description: Main Glass Sigil repository under the great glass dome

sub_areas.name: The Cataloguing Halls
sub_areas.description: Where junior archivists sort incoming materials

Diplomats Row.description: Embassy buildings and neutral meeting grounds for inter-faction negotiations.

Sanctum Quarter.description: Major temples and religious administration. Serpent Choir's seat of power.

sub_areas.name: Choir Hall
sub_areas.description: Serpent Choir headquarters, High Apostle Yzura's seat

notable_establishments.name: Vesper's Consultation Office
notable_establishments.description: Contract Mediator Vesper sees petitioners here

notable_establishments.name: Tithe House
notable_establishments.description: Where divine contracts are finalized and payments rendered

Temple Row.description: Cathedral of the Eternal Flame, Temple of the Silent Watch, Shrine of Forgotten Names.

sub_areas.name: Cathedral of the Eternal Flame
sub_areas.description: Tallest religious structure, sacred fire never extinguished

sub_areas.name: Shrine of Forgotten Names
sub_areas.description: Memorial to those lost to Rifts

Academy Heights.description: Wizards Tower, magical education, and arcane research facilities.

The Reliquary.description: Sacred items studied and stored under heavy guard and wards.

Cult Corners.description: Brother Thane's Meeting Hall and other smaller faiths operate here.

sub_areas.name: Brother Thane's Meeting Hall
sub_areas.description: Public gathering space for the Returned

Cobbleway Market.description: Traditional open-air bazaar. Spice Alley, Cloth Row, street food stalls.

sub_areas.name: Food Court
sub_areas.description: Street food from a hundred cultures

Markets Infinite.description: The sprawling commercial heart of the city. Iron Fang Consortium territory.

notable_establishments.name: Sera Voss's Storage Room
notable_establishments.description: Behind a spice merchant, where Sera conducts business

Floating Bazaar.description: Elevated neon-lit platforms. Luxury goods, tourist attractions, sky restaurants.

sub_areas.name: Sky Platforms
sub_areas.description: Floating commercial platforms lit with neon

sub_areas.name: Vista Dining
sub_areas.description: Restaurants with views of the Tower

Neon Row.description: Entertainment district. Taverns, theaters, pleasure houses. Never sleeps.

Night Pits.description: Blood sport arenas. Gambling, gladiator culture, Sable's territory.

notable_establishments.name: Sable's Office
notable_establishments.description: Night Pits boss operates from here

notable_establishments.name: Champion's Obelisk
notable_establishments.description: Names of arena champions carved in stone

Scrapworks.description: Industrial salvage district. Mara the Scrapper's territory.

notable_establishments.name: Mara's Office
notable_establishments.description: The Scrapper runs her operation from here

Artisan Quarter.description: Craftspeople, artists, and the Guild of Ashen Scrolls scriptorium.

Ember Ward.description: Working class district. Union halls, mutual aid networks.

Coppergate.description: Lower middle class. Aspiring merchants and small business owners.

Ashfall Terraces.description: Vertical housing built into volcanic slopes. Warm, smoky.

sub_areas.name: Lower Vents
sub_areas.description: Near volcanic activity, cheap but dangerous

Duskhollow.description: Perpetual shadow zone. Home to night workers, those who avoid light.

sub_areas.name: The Blind Quarter
sub_areas.description: Where those without sight live comfortably

Outer Wall.description: Warden military installations. Four Great Gates, 12 bastions.

Ironworks.description: Iron Fang heavy industry. Factories, foundries, worker housing.

Shantytown Heights.description: Vertical slums. Patchwork Saints territory. Poverty but community.

sub_areas.name: Stack Housing
sub_areas.description: Vertical slums built atop each other

Collapsed Plaza.description: Ruined district from a past Rift disaster. Scavenger territory. Dangerous.

The Fringe.description: Edge of mapped territory. Last permanent habitation before the unknown.

warrens_distribution.name: Eastern Warrens
warrens_distribution.description: Oldest warren network. Smugglers, cults, Patchwork Saints stronghold.

warrens_distribution.name: Northern Warrens (The Depths)
warrens_distribution.description: Deepest underground. Mushroom farms, blind communities, forgotten things.

warrens_distribution.name: Western Warrens (Rustside)
warrens_distribution.description: Former industrial. Toxic salvage, dangerous chemicals, desperate communities.

warrens_distribution.name: Southern Warrens (Ashfall)
warrens_distribution.description: Near volcanic vents. Forge communities, heat-adapted peoples.

warrens_distribution.name: Underbelly Warrens
warrens_distribution.description: Vertical slums in the city's foundations. No natural light ever reaches here.

sewers.description: The vast sewer network that serves the entire city. Multiple levels, some areas unmapped.

major_sections.name: Forum Sewers
major_sections.description: Well-maintained, Warden-patrolled. Clean by sewer standards.

major_sections.name: Sanctum Drains
major_sections.description: Holy water runoff creates strange effects. Some areas warded.

major_sections.name: Market Underdrain
major_sections.description: Heavy traffic from commerce. Smuggler routes. Rat problems.

major_sections.name: Residential Collectors
major_sections.description: Standard residential waste. Occasionally used by criminals.

major_sections.name: Industrial Outflow
major_sections.description: Toxic, dangerous, largely unmonitored. Strange mutations.

major_sections.name: Sewer Grid 7
major_sections.description: Rift-affected section. Reality unstable. Glass Sigil monitors.

major_sections.name: The Deep Sewers
major_sections.description: Ancient levels beneath the modern system. No maps exist.

lairs.description: Known creature lairs and monster dens throughout the underground.

locations.name: The Rat King's Warren
locations.description: Massive intelligent rat colony. Trade information for food.
locations.inhabitants: Giant rats, rat-folk, the Rat King himself

locations.name: Slime Pits
locations.description: Toxic pools breeding oozes and slimes of various types.

locations.name: The Spider Galleries
locations.description: Web-choked tunnels home to giant spider colonies.

locations.name: Goblin Warrens
locations.description: Extensive goblin settlement in the deep tunnels.

locations.name: The Carrion Caves
locations.description: Where ghouls and worse feed on the dead.

locations.name: Troll Depths
locations.description: Where trolls regenerate in the dark and hunt.

locations.name: The Wyvern Roost
locations.description: Volcanic caves where fire-resistant wyverns nest.

locations.name: Mimic Alley
locations.description: An entire section where mimics have established dominance.

dungeons.description: Ancient structures, abandoned facilities, and dangerous complexes beneath the city.

locations.name: The Old Prison
locations.description: Pre-Tower era prison complex. Cells still intact. Something still screams at night.
locations.history: Built before the Tower arrived. Used for political prisoners. Sealed after an incident.

locations.name: The Sunken Temple
locations.description: Temple to a forgotten god, collapsed into the underground. Still holy... to something.
locations.history: Predates current pantheon. Collapsed during the Third Rift Crisis.

locations.name: Artificer's Folly
locations.description: Abandoned research complex. Failed golem experiments still patrol.
locations.history: Sealed after a catastrophic experiment 200 years ago.

locations.name: The Merchant Vaults
locations.description: Legendary treasure vaults from the first Merchant Princes. Trapped extensively.
locations.history: Built during the founding era. Keys lost to time.

locations.name: The Warden Tombs
locations.description: Where fallen Wardens are interred. Honor guard still patrols.
locations.history: Sacred burial ground for defenders of the Wall.

locations.name: The Rift Laboratories
locations.description: Research facility built to study Rifts. Abandoned after researchers changed.
locations.history: Tower Authority project, terminated. Records sealed.

locations.name: The Drowned Coliseum
locations.description: Ancient arena from a civilization before the Tower. Partially flooded.

locations.name: Thane's Labyrinth
locations.description: Tunnel complex being excavated by Brother Thane's Cult. Purpose unknown.
locations.history: Currently under construction. The Cult guards it jealously.

sanctums.description: Hidden holy places, cult strongholds, and secret gathering places.

locations.name: The Choir Undercroft
locations.description: Secret Serpent Choir meeting hall. Divine contracts too sensitive for surface.

locations.name: Thane's Inner Sanctum
locations.description: Brother Thane's true seat of power. Where the Returned truly gather.
locations.access: Trusted cult members, Speakers and above

locations.name: The Widow's Web
locations.description: Obsidian Lotus true headquarters. The Widow rules from here.

locations.name: The Memory Vault
locations.description: Glass Sigil's most sensitive storage. Memories deemed too dangerous to exist.

locations.name: Saints' Refuge
locations.description: Secret Patchwork Saints headquarters and emergency shelter.

locations.name: The Forge Shrine
locations.description: Secret shrine to Ashara the Phoenix Marshal. Wardens' hidden faith.
locations.access: Wardens who know the old ways

locations.name: The Counting House
locations.description: Iron Fang's true vault and meeting room. Where real deals happen.

locations.name: The Arena Crypts
locations.description: Where Argent Blades initiate new members through blood trials.

locations.name: The Silent Library
locations.description: Repository of forbidden texts maintained by an unknown curator.

locations.name: The Tower's Roots
locations.description: Ancient chambers at the Tower's foundation. The Oracle's dreams echo here.

transit_tunnels.description: The underground transit network connecting districts.

locations.name: Deep Line Stations
locations.description: Unofficial underground train connecting warren clusters. No Warden patrols.

locations.name: Maintenance Tunnels
locations.description: Service tunnels for the legitimate train lines. Worker access only.

locations.name: Abandoned Stations
locations.description: Old stations from routes no longer in service.

special_underground.description: Unique underground locations that don't fit other categories.

locations.name: Echo Alley
locations.description: Acoustically haunted smuggler tunnels. Sound behaves wrong. Obsidian Lotus territory.

locations.name: The Fungal Forest
locations.description: Massive underground mushroom forest. Food source for deep communities.

locations.name: The Crystalline Caves
locations.description: Natural crystal formations with magical resonance.

locations.name: The Bone Market
locations.description: Underground black market dealing in remains, relics, and forbidden goods.

locations.name: The Drowning Pools
locations.description: Flooded chambers with air pockets. Aquatic creatures and worse.

locations.name: Rift Scar Zone
locations.description: Areas permanently damaged by Rift activity. Reality is thin.

train_tubes.description: Seven major tube lines connecting the city.

major_lines.name: Spine Line (Silver)
major_lines.route: Tower → Forum → Sanctum → Markets → North Wall

major_lines.name: Eastern Radial (Blue)
major_lines.route: Forum → Sanctum East → Markets East → Hearthstone → Eastern Warrens

major_lines.name: Northern Radial (White)
major_lines.route: Forum → Temple Row → Floating Bazaar → Ashfall → Fringe

major_lines.name: Southern Radial (Green)
major_lines.route: Forum → Guild Spires → Scrapworks → Collapsed Plaza → Southern Warrens

canal_rings.name: Forum Canal
canal_rings.description: Separates Forum from Sanctum. Diplomatic vessels.

canal_rings.name: Outer Canal (The Trench)
canal_rings.description: Industrial shipping, military patrols, smugglers at night.
